title: Multi-file .verb Linking Implementation Plan
summary: Task-by-task implementation plan for letting verb run/build accept and link multiple .verb files with per-file error attribution.
notes: Structured as an implementation/task plan (checkboxes, TDD steps, code diffs, team assignment) rather than an ADR/PRD/SPEC. Contains a 'Global Constraints' section referencing an external spec ('spec: Non-goals', 'spec: Semantics', 'spec: Goals', 'spec: Accepted limitation') but that spec document itself is not included here — only pointers to it. No frontmatter, no Accepted/Proposed status, no user stories, no endpoint/schema tables. Classified as DOC (procedural/process documentation) since it documents how to execute work rather than recording a locked decision, product requirement, or technical contract itself.
